message:
test(e2e): add hero-scoped prod-verification variant of scroll-indicator spec

Adds `tests/e2e/_diag-scroll-indicator-prod.spec.ts`, a mirror of
`_diag-scroll-indicator.spec.ts` that points at `jeffreyemanuel.com`
instead of `localhost:3000`. Used to verify the mobile hero fix is
actually live on the production deployment after a push, not just in
the local dev server.

Selector is hero-scoped (same as the dev spec) so articles without
in-hero stat chips (e.g. barra-factor-model) skip the overlap assertion
rather than matching a chip-styled element from deeper in the article
body and producing a false failure.

All five articles (wills-and-estate, slack-mattermost, overprompting,
raptorq, barra-factor-model) currently pass against production at
375×800.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
